set_name: Campaign Set B — TikTok Native · Stream · Fight Cards · Events
note: Run parallel to Set A (ads/campaigns.json). Different hooks and creatives — A/B test or separate audiences.

phases.name: TikTok-Native UGC
phases.start_when: Same week as Set A Phase 1 — separate ad sets

phases.name: Fight Card Hype
phases.start_when: Week 2 or when promoting HB 002 card

meta.note: Optional on Meta — primary channel is TikTok

ads.name: AD_SetB_TT_WhatIs_CropTank
ads.headline: What Is Hologram Boxing?
ads.meta_primary: What is hologram boxing? Real talk — you don't fight. Inflatable tent, AR on, AI boxers in a glowing square. Family-friendly. Tap to book.
ads.tiktok_text: What is hologram boxing? 🥊 You DON'T fight — AI boxers in a tent with AR on. Lowkey the future of fight night.

ads.name: AD_SetB_TT_WhatIs_Hoodie
ads.headline: Hologram Boxing Explained
ads.meta_primary: Same VO — hoodie UGC variant for A/B. Inflatable tent + AR + glowing square. Tap to book Creators AI Hologram Boxing.
ads.tiktok_text: POV: you find out hologram boxing is real 😭 Tent + AR + AI fighters. Tap to book ↓

ads.name: AD_SetB_TT_WhatIs_FullPlate
ads.headline: You Don't Fight — You Watch
ads.meta_primary: Inflatable tent. AR headset. AI hologram boxers in a glowing floor square. Spectator-only fight night. Tap to book.
ads.tiktok_text: Real talk — you don't fight. You watch Wave hologram boxers in AR. Tap ↓

ads.name: AD_SetB_Stream_Free
ads.headline: Watch Free on Kick & Twitch
ads.meta_primary: Every hologram fight streams live FREE on @creatorsai. Tent tickets = full AR in Me vs Me crypto. Stream now, book the tent later.
ads.tiktok_text: Free live hologram fights on Kick & Twitch @creatorsai 🔴 Full AR tent = book on site.

ads.name: AD_SetB_Follow_CreatorsAI
ads.headline: Follow @creatorsai
ads.meta_primary: Live fight alerts, episode drops, ticket countdowns on Kick & Twitch. Follow @creatorsai then book when you're ready.
ads.tiktok_text: Follow @creatorsai — live fights + HB 002 drops. Don't miss the next card.

ads.name: AD_SetB_GoldVsFire
ads.headline: Gold vs Fire — HB 002
ads.meta_primary: Main event: Wave Gold vs Wave Fire rematch inside the inflatable tent. $10K prize pool. Pick your fighter when you buy — win if they win. MVM crypto tickets.
ads.tiktok_text: Gold vs Fire rematch 🥇🔥 HB 002. Pick your side. $10K on the line.

ads.name: AD_SetB_BlueVsSilver
ads.headline: Blue vs Silver
ads.meta_primary: Co-main: Wave Blue vs Wave Silver on HB 002. 200 MVM headset POV or 350 MVM attendee POV. Pick your fighter for the fan prize pool.
ads.tiktok_text: Blue vs Silver co-main ⚡️ Speed vs phantom energy. Tickets on site.

ads.name: AD_SetB_GreenVsPink
ads.headline: Green vs Pink
ads.meta_primary: Undercard banger: Wave Green vs Wave Pink. Don't sleep on early fights — pick your fighter for the fan prize pool.
ads.tiktok_text: Green vs Pink undercard 💚💗 Power vs speed in the glowing square.

ads.name: AD_SetB_10K_Prize
ads.headline: $10K Prize Pool
ads.meta_primary: Hologram Boxing 002 — $10,000 fighter pool. Buy a ticket, pick your Wave fighter. If they win, you're in the fan prize pool.
ads.tiktok_text: $10K prize pool. Pick your fighter. Win if they win. Tap to book.

ads.name: AD_SetB_BookTheTent
ads.headline: Book the Tent
ads.meta_primary: Birthdays, corporate events, festivals — we bring the inflatable tent, AR headsets, and Wave hologram fights. Submit a booking request on our site.
ads.tiktok_text: Hologram boxing at YOUR party 🎉 Tent + AR + fights. Request a date ↓

ads.name: AD_SetB_ApplyFighter
ads.headline: Apply as Hologram Fighter
ads.meta_primary: Creators — featured as a Wave variant in the hologram ring. $10K prize pool at HB 002. Apply on Book page — separate from spectator tickets.
ads.tiktok_text: Want in the hologram ring? Fighter applications open for HB 002. Tap to apply.
